response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive leadership experience in senior software development roles across multiple high-profile companies, including Naver and Tencent, with a strong focus on architecture, team mentorship, and modern technology stacks. His background includes open-source contributions, UML/programming expertise, and strategic project management, though his German proficiency is only basic and his experience in IT security/compliance is not explicitly highlighted.
strengths: Proven senior leadership in software development with roles at major tech companies (Naver, Tencent) and startups
Strong technical expertise in architecture, Linux/Unix environments, and open-source technologies
Experience in mentoring teams, TDD, CI/CD, and full-stack development across diverse domains
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required)
Limited explicit mention of IT security, risk management, or compliance experience in the resume
No clear evidence of UML modeling expertise or requirements management in the provided summary
